utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates – fully specified (departure and return dates). ✓
3. transportation – fully specified with airline, class, price per person and total cost. ✓
4. accommodation – fully specified with property name, type, star rating, location, price etc. ✓
5. activities – present, includes name, duration, cost, guide, and difficulty. ✓
6. additional_services – present with meal preferences, accessibility, payment, refund, and change policy. ✓
7. total_budget – fully specified with total cost, currency, remaining budget, payment due date, and cancellation deadline. ✓
All 7 items are present and fully detailed.
